subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! How joyous, how joyous, that ye are enraptured by the Beloved of Abhá and are enthralled by that celestial Beauty of the Most High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء خوشا خوشا که مفتون دلبر ابهااید و مجنون آن معشوق ملا اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
